variants.title: Donaldson P569024 Fuel Filter, Water Separator Spin-On Twist&Drain
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P569024 Fuel Filter, Water Separator Spin-On Twist&Drain effectively separates water and contaminants from diesel fuel, ensuring clean fuel delivery and preventing engine damage. Its twist-and-drain feature allows for easy water removal. Ideal for trucks, marine engines, and heavy equipment, this filter helps maintain fuel system integrity and efficiency.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β100
